name: USCB FINANCIAL HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I Overview USCB Financial Holdings, Inc., a Florida corporation (the Company), was formed on December 17, 2021, to serve as the holding company for U.S. Century Bank, a Florida state-chartered bank, and is a bank holding company (a BHC) registered with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the Federal Reserve) under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHC Act). The Company is headquartered in Miami, Florida, and, through the Bank, its sole direct subsidiary...
